{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230327490A118916F25CA6542068"}"},"total":1597},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7216224427321754402","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看的九叔同人文里最好的一本了，有些剧情做了更改，不过各个剧情衔接的很流畅，逻辑也很好，主角刻画的有血有肉，大爱[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680158262,"group_id":"7110098220906187817","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"佛系看书，全看缘分","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9MQDj5JfDUaX3O32FF7hsM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/da4a4192d79144f1aa938783bdfdca78~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792280&x-signature=i0InviVxEJHbBnoEXHOOhh8Q9Yc%3D","user_id":"110801884335","user_name":"想撸猫的鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110801884335","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1783955060,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7110098220906187817","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主】+【杀伐果断】+【成长流】
温华魂穿九叔世界变成一个婴儿，
谁知穿越过来就遇到了诡异事件。
所幸在紧急时刻被九叔救下，
与身边的婴儿一同被九叔收养，取名许文华与许文才。
在被九叔收为儿徒的那刻，文华觉醒消消乐游戏金手指。
从此文华躲在九叔身后四处蹭鬼怪、僵尸能量点，
从消消乐游戏中获得诸多武功、道术秘籍和物品，
开启了专属与他的末法天师时代。
......
九叔：“劣徒，好好的茅山剑法不练，为何去练刀法？”
文华：“师父啊，我感觉我的刀法更强...”
九叔：“你是想要欺师灭祖？”
文华：“不是啊，我觉得刀用的更爽一点。”
九叔：“所以，这就是你自制了桃木刀的理由？”
若干年后......

07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230327490A118916F25CA6542068"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":33994,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":105438,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1784},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7125272718609580832","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，没有什么狗血的剧情。也没有道士跟鬼有什么亲情的关系。也没有什么情情爱爱的糟心事。嗯，还可以，请继续保持。[送心][送心][送心]后面不要崩。请不要写一些感情戏。十本写感情戏的九本要崩，还有一本是大神写的。求求了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658981860,"group_id":"7110098220906187817","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9IMxDfX/srFNYZRcm1d66CFprWkPq7xcmBnaIBCv6ch","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/507e0bab6d6a43939088311ca4f59c54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787854&x-signature=kQYRxXQRg3gL2GIAbApa9oAmn9k%3D","user_id":"4353677909566941","user_name":"冠东"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4353677909566941","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775651463,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f
